name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Rogue Named Pipe Impersonation
notes: This building block detects a privilege escalation attempt via rogue named pipe impersonation.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Rogue Named Pipe Impersonation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)
when the event matches LOWER("Pipe Name") MATCHES '\\.*\\pipe\\.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Rogue Named Pipe Impersonation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)
AND when the event matches LOWER("Pipe Name") MATCHES '\\.*\\pipe\\.*' AQL filter query
